title: Cleanup TEST Data button returns 404 error
description: The 'Cleanup TEST Data' button in the admin interface fails with a 404 error when clicked. Additionally, the cleanup functionality lacks collection/chunk selection granularity.
user_report: Admin clicking the Cleanup TEST Data returns an error box. Also it does not give a method to select the collection and/or chunk to focus the clean up.

technical_analysis.root_cause: HTTP method mismatch - endpoint defined in do_GET but called via POST

reproduction_steps: 4. Observe error box appears instead of cleanup confirmation
expected_behavior: Cleanup should execute successfully and display confirmation with cleanup statistics
actual_behavior: Error box appears, no cleanup occurs, 404 logged in server

missing_route.note: POST routes end with 'else: 404' - cleanup route missing

immediate_fix.action: Move /api/database/cleanup route from do_GET to do_POST method
immediate_fix.rationale: Frontend expects POST method for data-modifying operations

enhancement_request.title: Add collection/chunk selection granularity to cleanup
enhancement_request.description: Current cleanup is all-or-nothing for entire environment. Need UI to select specific collections or chunk ranges.
suggested_features: Selective cleanup by source_id or date range

test_cases: Cleanup should work in test/dev environments
UI should show success message after cleanup

impact_assessment.user_impact: High - critical admin functionality is broken
impact_assessment.data_risk: Medium - cleanup is currently non-functional (safer but blocks testing)
impact_assessment.development_blocker: Yes - prevents database maintenance during testing

related_requirements: ADM-004: Admin UI must provide database management tools
ENV-002: Environment isolation must be maintained during cleanup
